tasks.label: Start dev environment
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml --profile dev up -d

tasks.label: Stop dev environment
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml --profile dev down

tasks.label: Clear volumes
tasks.command: read -p 'Are you sure you want to delete all volumes? (y/N): ' confirm && [[ $confirm == [yY] ]] && docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -q) || echo 'Cancelled.'
